title: Property Consultant - Phoenix Mills - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Phoenix Mills - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
